svg.text: The work of strengthening voice, credibility, and reach in the public conversation about health. PHIs use their nonpartisan, trusted-institution
position to elevate accurate information, counter misinformation, and stand alongside communities. This function depends heavily on the credibility
Credibility lets PHIs reach more people, which makes them
the go-to source, which rebuilds credibility. The engine,
but only as strong as the trust every other function
Speed and reach let PHIs counter falsehoods before they
set, which makes a healthier conversation, which builds

Standing alongside communities earns trust, which gives
authentic reach and voice, which deepens standing next
time. Local networks are the multiplier.
The louder the crisis, the more political attention it
draws, risking the partisan label that erodes the
nonpartisan credibility that gave the voice its power.
Real-time demand and broad amplification strain thin comms
and community staff, risking credibility. Amplifying
faster than the field can underwrite spends shared trust

svg.text: why Amplify is different from the others
Amplify does not build its own trust from scratch. It runs on the
credibility every other function builds, and it is the function most
Take a political side and the neutrality that underwrites credibility
erodes (B1). Amplify faster than the field can underwrite and you
